# Forex Factory Economic Calendar Feed

> A consolidated Forex Factory economic-calendar dataset, re-scraped every hour
> by GitHub Actions and published as a single JSON file. Built for programmatic
> and AI-agent consumption: fetch the raw URL below instead of scraping
> forexfactory.com (which is rate-limited and against their ToS).

The canonical resource is `news/calendar.json`: a JSON array of economic
events. Each event has `time`, `timezone`, `currency`, `impact`, `impact_level`,
`event`, `detail`, `actual`, `forecast`, `previous`, `day`, `date`, `datetime_utc`,
and `scraped_at`.

Read these before parsing — agents get them wrong otherwise:

- `time` + `date` are in the zone named by the `timezone` field (e.g.
  `Asia/Karachi`, UTC+5), NOT UTC and NOT the consumer's local time.
- `date` is `dd/mm/yyyy` (`10/06/2026` = 10 June), not ISO.
- `time` is `HH:MM` (24h) or a literal string like `All Day` or `Tentative`.
- `impact` is a colour: `red`, `orange`, `yellow`, `gray`.
- `impact_level` is a semantic level: `high`, `medium`, `low`, `holiday`.
- `actual` is a string (e.g. `"4.2%"`) and is `""` when not yet released.
- `forecast` / `previous` are strings when present, and `null` when absent.
- `datetime_utc` is a single ISO-8601 UTC timestamp (e.g. `"2026-06-10T05:30:00Z"`),
  or `null` for non-timed events. Use this to avoid complex timezone math!
- `scraped_at` is the snapshot freshness timestamp in UTC, not the event time.

## Data

- [Calendar feed (JSON, canonical)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/joor0x/forex-factory-agent-feed/main/news/calendar.json): array of events, refreshed hourly. Fetch this.
- [JSON Schema](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/joor0x/forex-factory-agent-feed/main/calendar.schema.json): draft 2020-12 contract for the feed; validate against it if unsure.
- [Data Package](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/joor0x/forex-factory-agent-feed/main/datapackage.json): Frictionless descriptor for the JSON and CSV resources.

## Docs

- [README](https://github.com/joor0x/forex-factory-agent-feed/blob/main/README.md): scraper usage, config, alerts. Note its field table is stale; the schema above is authoritative.
- [AGENTS.md](https://github.com/joor0x/forex-factory-agent-feed/blob/main/AGENTS.md): instructions for agents working inside the repo.
- [Forex Factory Calendar (upstream source)](https://www.forexfactory.com/calendar): original data. Do not scrape directly; use the JSON feed.

## Optional

- [Repository](https://github.com/joor0x/forex-factory-agent-feed): full source, MIT licensed.
- [CSV mirror](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/joor0x/forex-factory-agent-feed/main/news/calendar.csv): flat CSV of the same rows (confirm path; emitted when output_format is `both`).
